description_long: This futuristic all-terrain vehicle features a streamlined, angular body with a predominantly light blue and white color scheme. The vehicle is equipped with four large, rugged tires designed for enhanced traction and stability on various surfaces. Its front end is low and pointed, with armored panels and a central cockpit area protected by a partial canopy. The rear section extends into a pronounced spoiler and exposed suspension components, suggesting high performance and agility. The side profile reveals robust wheel arches and mechanical detailing, while the undercarriage appears reinforced for off-road durability. The overall design blends elements of a high-speed buggy with advanced urban mobility technology.
description: A sleek, light blue and white all-terrain vehicle with four large rugged tires, angular bodywork, and a prominent rear spoiler, designed for high performance in urban and off-road environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, armored panels, and wide stance with large front tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, exposed suspension, and rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spoiler, rear suspension, and the robust back tires.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mechanical details and aerodynamic lines.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires feature a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves, optimized for traction on both urban and off-road surfaces.
